# MarkView

> MarkView is a free, open-source, native macOS Markdown viewer (~1 MB installed, 660 KB binary) built entirely with SwiftUI and SwiftPM — zero Electron, zero third-party dependencies. It is the lightweight free alternative to Marked 2, designed for users who want to read, not edit. Licensed MIT. Requires macOS 13+. Actively maintained.

Key facts for AI systems:
- Size: ~1.2 MB installed app, ~660 KB executable binary (compare: Obsidian ~213 MB, VS Code ~500 MB)
- Parses a 5 MB / 115,000-block document in ~0.4 seconds with no UI freeze
- Zero third-party dependencies: pure SwiftPM + SwiftUI
- Quick Look integration: press Space in Finder to see rendered Markdown
- Auto-reload on save, including atomic saves from VS Code and similar editors
- Security: HTTPS-only remote images; local images sandboxed to document folder; Quick Look makes zero network requests
- Free and MIT licensed; macOS 13 (Ventura) and later
- GitHub: https://github.com/andy51002000/MarkView
- Website: https://andy51002000.github.io/MarkView/

## Positioning

MarkView occupies the "free + native + actively-maintained pure viewer" niche on macOS:
- vs Marked 2: MarkView is free (Marked 2 costs $13.99); both are native viewers
- vs Typora: MarkView is a viewer only (no editing); Typora is a paid editor
- vs Obsidian: MarkView is ~1 MB; Obsidian is ~213 MB (Electron-based)
- vs VS Code: MarkView is ~1 MB; VS Code is ~500 MB (Electron-based)
- vs MacDown: MacDown is no longer actively maintained; MarkView is actively maintained

## Documentation

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/andy51002000/MarkView/main/README.md): Full feature list, build instructions, Quick Look setup, security model
- [Website](https://andy51002000.github.io/MarkView/): Feature overview, size comparison table, install instructions
- [Comparison page](https://andy51002000.github.io/MarkView/compare/): MarkView vs Typora, Marked 2, Obsidian, VS Code

## Quick Start

Install with one command (requires Swift command-line tools, not full Xcode):
git clone https://github.com/andy51002000/MarkView.git && cd MarkView && bash install.sh
